title: Aristeguietia tahonensis
intro: Aristeguietia tahonensis, also known as Tahon's aristeguietia, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. The plant is reported to have potential health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may contribute to its use in traditional medicine for treating various ailments. The bioactive constituents of Aristeguietia tahonensis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Aristeguietia tahonensis is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of stress and anxiety.

The classification of Aristeguietia tahonensis includes the genus Aristeguietia and the tribe Senecioneae. Within the family Asteraceae, Aristeguietia tahonensis is a member of the subfamily Asteroideae.
